items.title_en: Germany goes from labour shortages to hiring freezes
items.title_zh: 德国由劳动力短缺走向招聘冻结
items.summary_en: Germany's economy has shifted from acute labor shortages to cautious hiring freezes as slowing growth and rising wage costs bite. The change reflects a tightening labor market where employers pause hires while navigating aging demographics and inflation, with implications for productivity and tech sectors.
items.summary_zh: 德国的经济已从严重的劳动力短缺转向谨慎的招聘冻结，增长放缓与工资成本上升压缩企业招募意愿。此变化反映劳动力市场的紧缩，企业在应对人口老龄化与通胀时放缓扩招，这对生产率和科技行业产生影响。

items.title_en: GenCAD
items.title_zh: GenCAD
items.summary_en: GenCAD appears to be a project centered on automated CAD generation and design workflows.
items.summary_zh: GenCAD 似乎是一个专注于自动化 CAD 生成与设计工作流的项目。

items.title_en: Multiple commencement speakers booed for AI comments during graduation speeches
items.title_zh: 多位毕业典礼演讲者因AI言论被观众嘘声
items.summary_en: Several commencement speakers faced boos after bringing up AI, highlighting a divide over AI's role in society and education. The reactions illustrate how the AI conversation can polarize audiences, even in celebratory settings, as institutions weigh automation's implications.
items.summary_zh: 多名毕业典礼发言人在提及人工智能后遭遇观众嘘声，凸显社会与教育领域对 AI 角色的分歧。此类反应显示人工智能话题已成为公众关注的焦点，即使在庆祝场合也会引发两极化讨论。

items.title_en: I don't think AI will make your processes go faster
items.title_zh: 我不认为AI会让你的流程更快
items.summary_en: The piece argues that AI alone rarely speeds up human or team processes; gains depend on processes, governance, and integration work. It emphasizes thoughtful workflow redesign and measurable outcomes rather than chasing hype.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为单纯依赖 AI 很难直接让工作流程更快，成效取决于流程设计、治理与集成工作。强调在追赶热度前，先进行工作流再设计并设定可衡量的结果。

items.title_en: The foundations of a provably secure operating system (PSOS) (1979) [pdf]
items.title_zh: 可证明安全操作系统（PSOS）的奠基
items.summary_en: A 1979 paper outlines a framework for an operating system whose security properties can be proven mathematically, addressing access control, isolation, and trusted computing base. It foreshadows modern formal methods and formal verification approaches used in systems like seL4 and other provably secure designs, highlighting enduring challenges in proving security properties in real-world OS design.
items.summary_zh: 1979年的这篇基础性论文提出一种可通过形式化推理来证明安全性的操作系统设计框架，聚焦访问控制、隔离性与受信计算基。它预示了现代形式化方法和操作系统安全证明的方向，并揭示在现实系统中实现可证明安全性所面临的难题。

items.title_en: Why is Google Maps back to showing old satellite images of Altadena?
items.title_zh: 谷歌地图为何重新显示 Altadena 的旧卫星影像
items.summary_en: Observers noted Google Maps reverting to older satellite imagery for Altadena, prompting questions about data sources, licensing, and update cadence. The article explains how imagery updates can lag or temporarily revert due to data sourcing decisions, storage considerations, or rights constraints.
items.summary_zh: 观察者发现谷歌地图在 Altadena 显示的是旧卫星影像，引发对数据源、许可与更新节奏的关注。报道指出卫星影像更新可能因数据来源、存取许可或存储成本等原因出现滞后或短暂回退。

items.title_en: Mozilla to UK regulators: VPNs are essential privacy and security tools
items.title_zh: Mozilla致英国监管机构：VPN是必需的隐私与安全工具
items.summary_en: Mozilla argues regulators should preserve VPNs as essential tools for privacy and security, outlining risks of weakening VPN access and potential impact on freedom of expression. It highlights the role of open standards and consumer rights.
items.summary_zh: Mozilla 呼吁监管机构维护 VPN 的核心地位，强调其在隐私和安全方面的作用，同时警惕限制 VPN 访问对言论自由和安全的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Two EA-18 fighter jets collide at Mountain Home airshow, pilots ejected safely
items.title_zh: 山地家园空军基地航空表演中两架 EA-18 战斗机相撞，飞行员均安全弹出
items.summary_en: Two EA-18 fighter jets collided during an air show at Mountain Home AFB, with both pilots ejecting safely. The incident will trigger an official investigation and could affect future safety procedures at civilian-military air shows.
items.summary_zh: 在 Mountain Home 空军基地的航空表演中，两架 EA-18 战斗机相撞，飞行员均安全弹出。事件将启动官方调查，可能影响未来军民航空表演的安全措施。

items.title_en: It is time to give up the dualism introduced by the debate on consciousness
items.title_zh: 放弃意识辩论中引入的二元论
items.summary_en: Philosophical piece urging readers to drop the traditional mind–body dualism invoked by debates about consciousness. It argues for a monist or non-dual framework that treats consciousness as emergent from physical processes, challenging long-standing dichotomies.
items.summary_zh: 本文呼吁放弃在意识辩论中常见的二元论思维，主张以更贴近物理过程的单一框架来理解意识。通过将意识视为物理过程的涌现，挑战长期存在的二分法。

items.title_en: AI is a technology not a product
items.title_zh: AI是技术不是产品
items.summary_en: This essay argues that AI is a technology stack rather than a finished product, with implications for regulation, safety, and how organizations adopt AI capabilities rather than chasing packaged apps.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为 AI 只是技术堆栈而非成品，强调在监管、安全和组织采用方面应关注能力而非追逐现成的产品。

items.title_en: Show HN: Semble – Code search for agents that uses 98% fewer tokens than grep
items.title_zh: Show HN: Semble——面向代理的代码搜索，使用的 token 比 grep 少 98%
items.summary_en: Semble is a code search tool designed for agents that uses far fewer tokens than grep, enabling more efficient code discovery in AI agent workflows. It demonstrates how smarter indexing can reduce prompt sizes.
items.summary_zh: Semble 是一个为代理优化的代码搜索工具，其所需 token 远少于 grep，提升了 AI 代理工作流中的代码发现效率。展示了更智能的索引如何减小提示尺寸。

items.title_en: WriteUp: 16 Bytes of x86 that turn Matrix rain into sound
items.title_zh: 写作笔记：16 字节的 x86 将矩阵雨变成声音
items.summary_en: A write-up demonstrates how 16 bytes of x86 code can synthesize audible sound from the Matrix rain visualization, illustrating extreme code-golf techniques and low-level audio synthesis. The result highlights how tiny snippets can produce multimedia.
items.summary_zh: 这篇写作展示了用仅仅16字节的 x86 代码就能把矩阵雨可转成声音，体现了极简编码与多媒体合成的极限。对于低级编程与代码高球爱好者而言，这是一个有趣的演示，展示了紧凑代码如何实现音频合成。

items.title_en: Native all the way, until you need text
items.title_zh: 追求原生体验，直到你需要文本输入
items.summary_en: A debate about when to embrace native interfaces versus web/web-based solutions; native UX reigns for performance and feel, but text input and rich typography often push developers toward web tech. A prudent middle-ground emerges for pragmatic product design.
items.summary_zh: 就原生界面与网页技术的取舍展开讨论：原生 UX 在性能与手感上更强，但文本输入和排版需求常使人转向网页技术。实用的设计取舍在于权衡场景与需求。

items.title_en: I turned a $80 RK3562 Android tablet into a Debian Linux workstation
items.title_zh: 把 80 美元的 RK3562 Android 平板改造成 Debian 工作站
items.summary_en: A budget-friendly hack demonstrates how a low-end Android tablet can become a functional Debian workstation, shedding light on hardware limits, driver support, and the potential for repurposing consumer devices. It shows that with the right setup, cheap hardware can become viable for light development tasks.
items.summary_zh: 用一块低价平板就能跑 Debian，展示了硬件极限、驱动与开源生态对再利用的影响。通过合适的设置，廉价设备也能胜任轻量开发工作。

items.title_en: Microsoft admits Windows 11's dedicated Copilot key breaks certain workflows
items.title_zh: 微软承认 Windows 11 的专用 Copilot 键会打断某些工作流程
items.summary_en: Microsoft concedes that the new Copilot hardware key can interfere with established workflows for some apps and users. The company says it will add a way to rebind or disable the key later this year, signaling a move toward more user control in feature-dense OS updates.
items.summary_zh: 微软承认 Windows 11 新的 Copilot 硬件键在某些应用和工作流中造成干扰。公司表示今年晚些时候将提供重新绑定或禁用该键的选项，体现出在功能密集的操作系统更新中对用户可控性的重视。

items.title_en: Prolog Coding Horror
items.title_zh: Prolog 编程的恐惧
items.summary_en: Prolog has a reputation for a steep learning curve and quirky behavior that makes debugging a headache. This piece highlights Prolog's backtracking and logic-first mindset, arguing many developers find it a painful fit for real-world projects.
items.summary_zh: 本文直陈 Prolog 的学习曲线陡峭、行为怪异且回溯机制复杂，调试常常令人头疼。文章聚焦其逻辑驱动的工作方式，认为在实际项目中，许多开发者会因此感到深刻的“编码恐惧”。

items.title_en: Apple Silicon costs more than OpenRouter
items.title_zh: Apple Silicon 成本高于 OpenRouter
items.summary_en: A comparison of energy efficiency and cost when running offline LLMs shows that consumer Apple Silicon may incur higher energy use or cost than purpose-built OpenRouter setups. Practical implications for on-device AI planning and hardware strategy.
items.summary_zh: 对离线运行的 AI 模型进行能耗与成本比较，表明 Apple Silicon 在离线推理上可能不如专用的 OpenRouter 设置高效或经济。为在设备端部署 AI 的硬件策略提供实际启示。

items.title_en: VoIP brings back old-fashioned pay phones to rural Vermont (2025)
items.title_zh: VoIP 技术在佛蒙特州农村重新部署电话亭（2025）
items.summary_en: A pilot uses VoIP-based payphones to fill gaps in rural Vermont where mobile coverage is spotty. Internet-connected kiosks offer emergency calling and everyday use, reviving a classic public amenity with modern networking.
items.summary_zh: VoIP 技术在佛蒙特州农村重新部署电话亭，弥补移动覆盖薄弱带来的通信盲区。借助互联网连接，这些亭子既能提供紧急呼叫，也能完成日常通话，展示用现代网络改造旧有基础设施的尝试。

items.title_en: America's Most-Spoken Languages After English and Spanish
items.title_zh: 美洲最常说的语言（英语与西班牙语之外）
items.summary_en: Visual Capitalist maps the languages most spoken in the Americas after English and Spanish, highlighting the roles of Portuguese, French, French Creole, Indigenous languages, and immigrant communities. The map informs localization and cultural understanding across markets.
items.summary_zh: Visual Capitalist 汇总并绘制美洲地区在英语和西班牙语之外最常说的语言分布，显示葡萄牙语、法语、克里奥尔语以及土著语言等的影响力格局。该信息有助于市场本地化和跨文化理解。

items.title_en: The History of ThinkPad: From IBM’s Bento Box to Lenovo’s AI Workstations
items.title_zh: ThinkPad 的历史：从 IBM 的 Bento Box 到 Lenovo 的 AI 工作站
items.summary_en: A retrospective traces ThinkPad's journey from IBM's era and its iconic 'Bento Box' design to Lenovo's modern shift toward AI-accelerated workstations.
items.summary_zh: 本文回顾 ThinkPad 的发展史：从 IBM 时代的标志性设计到联想在 AI 时代的工作站定位的转变。通过设计与定位的变迁，揭示了企业移动性与硬件设计文化的演进。

items.title_en: Zerostack – A Unix-inspired coding agent written in pure Rust
items.title_zh: Zerostack——用纯Rust编写的类 Unix 编码助手
items.summary_en: Zerostack is a Unix-inspired coding agent built in Rust, aiming to streamline command-line tooling and automation. It demonstrates how safety and performance-friendly Rust can empower developer tooling.
items.summary_zh: Zerostack 是一个用纯 Rust 编写、受 Unix 启发的编码助手，旨在提升命令行工具与自动化的效率，展示了 Rust 在开发者工具中的潜力。

items.title_en: Étienne Ghys: The Shape of Letters: From Leonardo da Vinci to Donald Knuth
items.title_zh: Étienne Ghys：字母形状的演变：从达·芬奇到 Knuth
items.summary_en: Étienne Ghys traces the evolution of letter shapes across art and math, linking Leonardo da Vinci’s sketches to Donald Knuth’s typographic work. The talk reveals how visual form intersects with computation and design, relevant to typography, UI, and programming culture.
items.summary_zh: 埃蒂安·盖伊斯追溯字母形状在艺术与数学中的演变，将达·芬奇的素描与唐纳德·克努斯的排版工作联系起来。该讲座揭示了视觉形式、计算与设计之间的交叉，对排版、用户界面与编程文化具有启示作用。

items.title_en: CUDA Books
items.title_zh: CUDA 书籍合集
items.summary_en: A curated round-up of CUDA-focused books for developers, outlining topics from fundamentals to advanced GPU programming. It serves as a quick learning path for accelerating workloads on GPUs.
items.summary_zh: 收集整理了专注于 CUDA 的书籍，涵盖从入门到高级的 GPU 编程主题，为加速工作负载提供了快速学习路径。

items.title_en: A nicer voltmeter clock
items.title_zh: 更好看的电压表时钟
items.summary_en: An electronics project that pairs a voltmeter display with a clock, delivering a visually appealing, informative gadget. It showcases playful hardware tinkering and practical time-keeping.
items.summary_zh: 一个电子制作项目，将电压表显示与时钟结合，呈现出既美观又实用的小装置，展示了有趣的硬件玩家精神与实用计时。

items.title_en: Tesla Solar Roof is on life support as it pivot to panels
items.title_zh: 特斯拉太阳能屋顶陷入生死边缘，转而聚焦太阳能板
items.summary_en: Tesla Solar Roof is on life support as it pivots to traditional panels; the premium roof product has faced cost and installation hurdles, pushing the company to focus on conventional PV. This shift may accelerate adoption of standard panels and reshape expectations for building-integrated photovoltaics.
items.summary_zh: 特斯拉太阳能屋顶在成本与安装难题面前陷入难题，转而重点推进传统太阳能板。此举或将加速传统面板的普及，并改变建筑一体化光伏的市场预期。

items.title_en: Fabricked: Misconfiguring Infinity Fabric to Break AMD SEV-SNP
items.title_zh: Fabricked：错误配置 Infinity Fabric 以突破 AMD SEV-SNP
items.summary_en: Fabricked is a security research project demonstrating that misconfiguring AMD's Infinity Fabric can defeat SEV-SNP isolation, highlighting risks in virtualized memory protection.
items.summary_zh: Fabricked 展示通过错误配置 AMD 的 Infinity Fabric 可能破坏 SEV-SNP 的内存隔离，凸显虚拟化内存保护的潜在风险与攻击面。

items.title_en: Hosting a website on an 8-bit microcontroller
items.title_zh: 在 8 位微控制器上托管网站
items.summary_en: Running a website from an 8-bit microcontroller demonstrates extreme constraints and ingenuity; while practical for tiny pages, it reveals limitations in networking, memory, and software ecosystems. A niche but instructive look at minimal hardware hosting.
items.summary_zh: 在 8 位微控制器上托管网站展示了极端的资源限制和创意实现。虽然适用于极简页面，但暴露了网络、内存与软件生态的局限性。

items.title_en: Don’t Outsource the Learning
items.title_zh: 别把学习外包出去
items.summary_en: Don’t Outsource the Learning: Addy Osmani argues developers should own their learning rather than outsourcing it to courses or teams; invest in deliberate practice, knowledge sharing, and building an internal learning culture.
items.summary_zh: Addy Osmani 主张开发者应掌握自己的学习主权，而非把学习完全外包给课程或团队；应通过刻意练习、知识分享和内部学习文化来持续提升技能。

items.title_en: Trials on veterans suggest ibogaine could provide a new treatment for PTSD
items.title_zh: 退伍军人研究表明 ibogaine 可能为 PTSD 提供新治疗方法
items.summary_en: Early trials suggest ibogaine could offer a new treatment for PTSD in veterans, possibly via neuroplasticity mechanisms. More research is needed to establish safety, dosing, and long-term outcomes.
items.summary_zh: 在退伍军人中的早期试验表明 ibogaine 可能为 PTSD 提供新疗法，或通过促进神经可塑性实现缓解。仍需进一步研究以确定安全性、剂量和长期效果。

items.title_en: The Four Horsemen of the LLM Apocalypse
items.title_zh: LLM 天启的四骑士
items.summary_en: This piece outlines four major threat categories facing large language models as they scale: data dependencies and licensing, model misuse and security, regulatory and societal pushback, and the risk of brittle systems under real-world use.
items.summary_zh: 文章提出在大语言模型扩展过程中面临的四大威胁类别：数据依赖与许可、模型滥用与安全、监管与社会阻力，以及在实际应用中可能的脆弱性。

items.title_en: Prolog Basics Explained with Pokémon
items.title_zh: 用口袋妖怪讲解 Prolog 基础
items.summary_en: An approachable dive into Prolog's logic programming through Pokémon examples, making abstract concepts tangible for newcomers. The post blends playful illustrations with practical rule-based reasoning.
items.summary_zh: 用口袋妖怪的示例讲解 Prolog 的逻辑编程，让抽象概念变得直观。文章将生动的案例与基于规则的推理结合起来，便于初学者上手。

items.title_en: Museum of Imaginary Musical Instruments
items.title_zh: 想象中的乐器博物馆
items.summary_en: An online museum cataloging instruments that exist in imagination or virtual form, with interactive sound samples and histories.
items.summary_zh: 一个线上博物馆，收集存在于想象或虚拟形态的乐器，并提供互动音效示例与背景故事。

items.title_en: Mercurial, 20 years and counting: how are we still alive and kicking? [video]
items.title_zh: Mercurial：二十年仍在坚挺
items.summary_en: Mercurial celebrates two decades of existence, highlighting its tooling philosophy, performance, and the ongoing debate with Git. The video likely surveys the community, use cases, and what keeps Mercurial relevant in modern workflows.
items.summary_zh: Mercurial 已运行二十年，展示其工具设计哲学、性能与在与 Git 的持续对比中的定位。视频回顾社区、典型场景，以及令 Mercurial 在现代工作流中仍具生命力的因素。

items.title_en: Colossus: The Forbin Project
items.title_zh: Colossus：Forbin 项目
items.summary_en: Colossus imagines a self-aware defense computer and its consequences, a landmark work in AI-future fiction; the piece connects early cybernetic visions with modern AI governance debates.
items.summary_zh: Colossus 设想了一个具备自我意识的防御性计算机及其后果，是 AI 未来题材中的里程碑之作，与现代人工智能治理辩论存在呼应。

items.title_en: Ask an Astronaut: 333 hours of Q&A footage with astronauts
items.title_zh: 向宇航员提问：333 小时的问答影像
items.summary_en: 333 hours of Q&A footage with astronauts provides a rare, first-hand window into life in space, training, and decision-making under pressure. The archive serves as a rich resource for educators, researchers, and AI-trained simulations of human spaceflight.
items.summary_zh: 包含333小时的宇航员问答影像，揭示太空生活、训练和任务决策的第一手视角。该影像集对教育工作者、研究人员以及用于人机系统仿真的AI训练都具备宝贵价值。

items.title_en: Magical Realism: “Northern Exposure” 25 Years Later (2015)
items.title_zh: 《Northern Exposure》二十五年回顾：魔幻现实主义
items.summary_en: A nostalgia piece on Northern Exposure highlights its magical realism, quirky characters, and lasting impact two and a half decades after its debut. The essay argues the show's tonal blend still resonates in the streaming era.
items.summary_zh: 回顾性文章探讨《Northern Exposure》如何将魔幻现实主义与小镇叙事相融合，以及其在首播二十多年后的持续影响。作者认为在今日的流媒体时代，这部剧的风格与人物塑造仍具共鸣。

items.title_en: C++26 Shipped a SIMD Library Nobody Asked For
items.title_zh: C++26 发布了一款无人要求的 SIMD 库
items.summary_en: C++26 ships a SIMD library that many developers didn't request, drawing debate over practicality, API design, and portability. The piece argues this addition risks adding complexity without delivering clear performance wins.
items.summary_zh: C++26 发布了一款并非广泛需求的 SIMD 库，引发关于实用性、API 设计与跨平台性的讨论。文章认为此功能的引入可能带来额外的复杂性，而未必带来显著的性能提升。

items.title_en: Jank now has its own custom IR
items.title_zh: Jank 现推出自定义中间表示（IR）
items.summary_en: Jank now ships its own custom IR, enabling more aggressive optimizations and easier backend targeting. This move signals a shift toward mature compiler infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: Jank 现推出自定义中间表示（IR），提升了代码优化的灵活性并简化后端目标对接。这一举措标志着编译器基础设施走向成熟。

items.title_en: Hindenburg’s Smoking Room
items.title_zh: 兴登堡号的吸烟室
items.summary_en: Revisiting the Hindenburg's smoking room shows how smoking aboard reflected its era's norms and safety limits for hydrogen airships. The piece uses this detail to illuminate design trade-offs and the broader context of the disaster.
items.summary_zh: 回顾兴登堡号上的吸烟室，揭示了当时社会对吸烟的态度以及氢气飞艇的安全挑战。文章以这一细节为切入点，阐释设计取舍及灾难发生的背景。

items.title_en: How diamonds are made
items.title_zh: Diamonds Are Made
items.summary_en: A geology-focused explainer on natural diamond formation—from deep-earth processes to high-pressure crystallization—linking to industrial applications and synthetic diamond tech.
items.summary_zh: 从深地过程到高压结晶，解释天然钻石的形成机制，并与工业应用及合成钻石技术相关联。

items.title_en: Crystals found inside wreckage from the first nuclear bomb test
items.title_zh: 第一颗核弹试验残骸中的晶体
items.summary_en: Scientists report crystals found inside wreckage from the Trinity test, offering new clues about the materials and processes involved in the early nuclear weapons experiment. The findings illuminate historical physics and materials science.
items.summary_zh: 科学家在第一颗核弹试验（Trinity）残骸中发现晶体，提供关于早期核武器试验材料与工艺的新线索。

items.title_en: A Good Lemma Is Worth a Thousand Theorems (2007)
items.title_zh: 一个好引理胜千个定理（2007）
items.summary_en: A 2007 piece argues that a single well-chosen lemma can unlock many theorems, underscoring the value of strategic insight over brute force in math. The article is aimed at mathematicians and students, explaining the craft of finding foundational results.
items.summary_zh: 2007 年的一篇文章主张，一条用得恰当的引理往往可以推导出大量定理，强调在数学中对策略性洞见的重视胜过纯粹的证明堆砌。文章面向数学家与学生，阐释发现基础结果的策略性价值。

items.title_en: kharp – k version 3 Language Interpreter in C#
items.title_zh: ksharp 第3版：用 C# 实现的语言解释器
items.summary_en: Version 3 of a simple language interpreter implemented in C# showcases the practicality of building language tooling in a mainstream language. It highlights approachable approaches to interpreter design for education and hobby projects.
items.summary_zh: 用 C# 实现的简易语言解释器推出第三版，展示在主流语言中构建语言工具的可行性，并为教育与业余项目提供了易于上手的解释器设计思路。

items.title_en: High-Entropy Alloy
items.title_zh: 高熵合金
items.summary_en: High-entropy alloys promise superior strength and resilience by mixing many elements; the item likely discusses recent breakthroughs or applications in aerospace, defense, or manufacturing.
items.summary_zh: 高熵合金通过混合多种元素实现更高强度和耐久性，近年来在航天、国防等领域出现新进展与应用。

items.title_en: Cannibalistic attacks between gray seals leave telltale “corkscrew” injuries
items.title_zh: 灰海豹同类相食的螺旋形伤口
items.summary_en: Scientists have identified corkscrew-shaped injuries on gray seals caused by cannibalistic attacks, revealing a previously underappreciated behavior in crowded colonies. The findings shed light on predator-prey dynamics in crowded colonies and could inform conservation strategies.
items.summary_zh: 科学家在灰海豹身上发现螺旋形咬伤，证实同类之间的攻击行为。研究揭示了拥挤群落中的捕食者–猎物动力学，并可能为保育策略提供参考。

items.title_en: Profunctor Equipment in Haskell
items.title_zh: Haskell 中的 Profunctor 设备
items.summary_en: This post delves into an advanced Haskell concept—profunctors and their practical “equipment”—to improve composability and data flow in functional code. It offers patterns and intuition grounded in category theory for building robust, reusable abstractions.
items.summary_zh: 文章深入探讨了 Haskell 的高级概念—对映函子及其实际用法，展示如何提升函数式代码的组合性与数据流控制，并给出基于范畴理论的实用模式与直觉。

items.title_en: The SGI Buyer's Guide (2003)
items.title_zh: 2003 年 SGI 买家指南
items.summary_en: A snapshot of SGI's workstation ecosystem circa 2003, useful for hardware historians and nostalgia-driven research into Silicon Graphics' product lineup and pricing.
items.summary_zh: 2003 年左右 SGI 工作站生态的快照，适合硬件史研究者与怀旧爱好者了解 Silicon Graphics 的产品线与定价。

items.title_en: Show HN: Mezz, a curl-able WiFi sandbox for IoT pentesting
items.title_zh: Show HN：Mezz，可 curl 的物联网渗透测试 WiFi 沙箱
items.summary_en: Mezz is a curl-friendly, portable WiFi sandbox for IoT pentesting that lets researchers script network scenarios and sandbox device behavior. It lowers the friction for reproducible security testing.
items.summary_zh: Mezz 是一个 curl 友好、便携的物联网 WiFi 沙箱，面向渗透测试。研究者可以脚本化网络场景并模拟设备行为，从而实现可重复的安全测试，降低门槛。

items.title_en: Build a Radio Wave Detector with Balls of Aluminum Foil
items.title_zh: 用铝箔球打造无线电波探测器
items.summary_en: A DIY guide shows how to assemble a simple radio-wave detector using aluminum foil spheres, turning everyday scraps into a learning tool for RF detection. It highlights that you don’t need fancy gear to observe basic RF phenomena, making tech more approachable.
items.summary_zh: 这篇动手教程展示了如何用铝箔球自制一个简单的无线电波探测器，将日常材料变成学习射频探测的工具，凸显无需高端设备也能观察到基本射频现象，降低了技术门槛。

items.title_en: The 30-Hour Shift That Turned a San Jose Robot Lab into a Global Spectacle
items.title_zh: 将圣何塞机器人实验室推向全球盛事的30小时轮班
items.summary_en: A 30-hour continuous shift at a San Jose robotics lab transformed a local facility into a global spectacle, illustrating how live demonstrations can amplify visibility for hardware work. The event underscores the hype around robotics progress and the power of crowd-engaging showcases.
items.summary_zh: 圣何塞一家机器人实验室持续30小时的工作轮班将本地场所变成全球性焦点，显示出实时演示如何放大硬件工作的曝光度，并凸显人们对机器人进展的热情以及以观众参与为驱动的展示力量。
